title: Survivor
why_this_song: Survivor by Destiny's Child (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'm not gon' blast you on the radio
I'm not gon' lie on you and your family

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gon'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gon'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "survivor" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "survivor" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now that you're out of my life
Thought that I would self destruct

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Survivor" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Survivor"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Destiny's Child one question about "Survivor", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Destiny's Child sobre "Survivor", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Survivor" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Survivor" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
